title: Content-Type Classification Schema
description: Schema for content-type classification config in Yen-Go. Defines curated/practice/training categories and their detection rules.

description.description: Human-readable description of this config file

types.description: Content type definitions keyed by numeric ID. These are architectural constants — IDs are frozen and must not change.

teaching_patterns.description: Regex patterns (Python re syntax) to detect teaching root comments. Matched case-insensitively.

name.description: Machine-readable slug for this content type

description.description: Detailed description of this content type

curatedThresholds.description: Thresholds for classifying a puzzle as curated (content_type=1)

min_quality.description: Minimum quality level (YQ.q) to qualify as curated

min_refutations.description: Minimum refutation count (YQ.rc) to qualify as curated

require_unique_first_move.description: Whether unique first move (YX.u=1) is required for curated

trainingThresholds.description: Thresholds for single-move tutorial detection (content_type=3). Puzzle is training if depth <= max_depth AND comment_level >= min_comment_level.

max_depth.description: Maximum solution depth (YX.d) for tutorial detection

min_comment_level.description: Minimum comment level (YQ.hc) for tutorial detection
